proposed_tasks.instructions: Use ListMatterSources and InspectRecord tools to locate any tenancy agreement, rent ledger, arrears letters, or related correspondence for the Napier accommodation matter. If found, retrieve and ingest them as source materials for further analysis.
proposed_tasks.title: Search matter source repository for Napier accommodation tenancy agreement and arrears correspondence

summary: No source materials or artifacts were provided for this task.
